questionHtml:
What is the sum of the coefficients when the equation is balanced with the smallest whole numbers?

__BaCl2 (aq) + __Fe2(SO4)3 (aq) → __FeCl3 (aq) + __BaSO4 (s)

A. 4

B. 6

C. 8

D. 9

meta.title: What is the sum of the coefficients when the equation is balanced with the smallest whole numbers? __BaCl2 (aq) + __Fe2(SO4)3 (aq) → __FeCl3 (aq) + __BaSO4 (s) A. 4 B. 6 C. 8 D. 9
